untranslatable_reason: Ascending Scallops pattern fundamentally requires detection of a curved valley formation with irregular lows—a multi-bar geometric shape that cannot be expressed through point-in-time indicator comparisons. The 'curved' and 'irregular but curved bottom' characteristics require visual/shape analysis across multiple bars that exceeds the capability of standard technical indicators. Only breakout conditions (close above/below the scallop low) can be approximated using Donchian levels, but the core pattern detection is not translatable.
